tools.name: achievementDefinitions.gamesAchievementDefinitionsList
tools.description: Lists all the achievement definitions for your application.

tools.name: achievements.gamesAchievementsIncrement
tools.description: Increments the steps of the achievement with the given ID for the currently authenticated player.

tools.name: achievements.gamesAchievementsList
tools.description: Lists the progress for all your application's achievements for the currently authenticated player.

tools.name: achievements.gamesAchievementsReveal
tools.description: Sets the state of the achievement with the given ID to `REVEALED` for the currently authenticated player.

tools.name: achievements.gamesAchievementsSetStepsAtLeast
tools.description: Sets the steps for the currently authenticated player towards unlocking an achievement. If the steps parameter is less than the current number of steps that the player already gained for the achievement, the achievement is not modified.

tools.name: achievements.gamesAchievementsUnlock
tools.description: Unlocks this achievement for the currently authenticated player.

tools.name: achievements.gamesAchievementsUpdateMultiple
tools.description: Updates multiple achievements for the currently authenticated player.

tools.name: applications.gamesApplicationsGet
tools.description: Retrieves the metadata of the application with the given ID. If the requested application is not available for the specified `platformType`, the returned response will not include any instance data.

tools.name: applications.gamesApplicationsGetEndPoint
tools.description: Returns a URL for the requested end point type.

tools.name: applications.gamesApplicationsPlayed
tools.description: Indicate that the currently authenticated user is playing your application.

tools.name: applications.gamesApplicationsVerify
tools.description: Verifies the auth token provided with this request is for the application with the specified ID, and returns the ID of the player it was granted for.

tools.name: events.gamesEventsListByPlayer
tools.description: Returns a list showing the current progress on events in this application for the currently authenticated user.

tools.name: events.gamesEventsListDefinitions
tools.description: Returns a list of the event definitions in this application.

tools.name: events.gamesEventsRecord
tools.description: Records a batch of changes to the number of times events have occurred for the currently authenticated user of this application.

tools.name: leaderboards.gamesLeaderboardsGet
tools.description: Retrieves the metadata of the leaderboard with the given ID.

tools.name: leaderboards.gamesLeaderboardsList
tools.description: Lists all the leaderboard metadata for your application.

tools.name: metagame.gamesMetagameGetMetagameConfig
tools.description: Return the metagame configuration data for the calling application.

tools.name: metagame.gamesMetagameListCategoriesByPlayer
tools.description: List play data aggregated per category for the player corresponding to `playerId`.

tools.name: players.gamesPlayersGet
tools.description: Retrieves the Player resource with the given ID. To retrieve the player for the currently authenticated user, set `playerId` to `me`.

tools.name: players.gamesPlayersGetMultipleApplicationPlayerIds
tools.description: Get the application player ids for the currently authenticated player across all requested games by the same developer as the calling application. This will only return ids for players that actually have an id (scoped or otherwise) with that game.

tools.name: players.gamesPlayersGetScopedPlayerIds
tools.description: Retrieves scoped player identifiers for currently authenticated user.

tools.name: players.gamesPlayersList
tools.description: Get the collection of players for the currently authenticated user.

tools.name: revisions.gamesRevisionsCheck
tools.description: Checks whether the games client is out of date.

tools.name: scores.gamesScoresGet
tools.description: Get high scores, and optionally ranks, in leaderboards for the currently authenticated player. For a specific time span, `leaderboardId` can be set to `ALL` to retrieve data for all leaderboards in a given time span. `NOTE: You cannot ask for 'ALL' leaderboards and 'ALL' timeSpans in the same request; only one parameter may be set to 'ALL'.

tools.name: scores.gamesScoresList
tools.description: Lists the scores in a leaderboard, starting from the top.

tools.name: scores.gamesScoresListWindow
tools.description: Lists the scores in a leaderboard around (and including) a player's score.

tools.name: scores.gamesScoresSubmit
tools.description: Submits a score to the specified leaderboard.

tools.name: scores.gamesScoresSubmitMultiple
tools.description: Submits multiple scores to leaderboards.

tools.name: snapshots.gamesSnapshotsGet
tools.description: Retrieves the metadata for a given snapshot ID.

tools.name: snapshots.gamesSnapshotsList
tools.description: Retrieves a list of snapshots created by your application for the player corresponding to the player ID.

tools.name: stats.gamesStatsGet
tools.description: Returns engagement and spend statistics in this application for the currently authenticated user.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
